translation_findings.issue: stale ウ./エ. markers in translated-stage zh field for choices C/D of q1 and q2; output/page_388.{md,json} renders correctly as A./B./C./D.
translation_findings.rationale: Release artifact (output/) is normalized; translated/ is intermediate stage. Confirmed clean in output/page_388.{md,json}.

notes: 4 exam questions (Q10-1..10-4). All choice-markers in output/ A/B/C/D. Answer indices correct (3,0,0,3). Translations faithful and fluent. Hiragana えい preserved as '泄漏/leakage'.
